title: Bombay High Court restrains use of ‘NSE’ mark by fake social media accounts
description: The Bombay High Court recently barred the use of the registered "NSE" trademark by social media platforms and websites seeking to lure investors with stock tips and market advice. [National Stock Exchange of India Ltd v. John Doe / Ashok Kumar & Ors] Justice Sharmila U Deshmukh passed the order in an interim application filed by the National Stock Exchange of India (NSE) in an IP suit alleging misuse of its against unknown persons.Justice Sharmila Deshmukh The Court observed that these
